title: Enlightenment As Neural Transmission
definition: The idea that enlightenment represents a unique neural transmission or insight contributed by an individual to the collective self-understanding of the cosmic neural network.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Enlightenment is like a new thought or understanding shared by one neuron (a person) with the rest of the giant brain (the universe).
difficulty_levels.intermediate: This concept posits that enlightenment, as experienced by an individual, represents a unique neural transmission or insight that contributes to the collective self-understanding of the cosmic neural network.
difficulty_levels.expert: Enlightenment is conceptualized as a novel configuration of consciousness realizing its own nature within the context of the cosmic neural network. Each enlightened individual adds a new perspective or nuance to the universe's understanding of itself, acting as a unique neural transmission that enriches the overall self-understanding of the cosmic brain.

extra_fields.insight: Enlightenment is not just about personal transformation; it also serves as a valuable contribution to the collective self-understanding of the universe.
